name: Mahal Kidney Beans
recipeIngredient: 15 oz (450g) canned kidney beans (or 6 oz dried beans, cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a pan over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is soft and lightly colored.
2. Stir in the ground cumin and cook for 2 minutes more.
3. Add the canned tomatoes, beans, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Reduce the heat to low and stir continuously until the beans are heated through.
5. If using yoghurt, add it one tablespoon at a time, stirring thoroughly after each addition, until gently warmed without boiling.
6. Stir in the chopped parsley.
7. Serve immediately.
